final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring a female host.

Style/medium: needs a "Douyin livestream UI" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2020s Chinese short-video platform interface design, Kuaishou livestream overlay conventions, mobile-first streaming app UI; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical format, typical livestream interface with host centered, interactive elements positioned naturally
Subject: must include a female host (神仙姐姐) holding a sign as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must include Douyin livestream interface elements (comments, likes, viewer count area)
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, engaging livestream atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign the host is holding
Constraints: must be 9:16 aspect ratio, recognizable as a livestream screenshot interface
Avoid:
